CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF WEYRICK, COLIN HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'LEARY, COLMAN POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: CATERPILLAR 12 MOTOR GRADER, ID # S/N 8T8129, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $8,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $135.00, DAMAGES FOR THE LOSS OF USE OF THE MOTOR GRADER, IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00. DAMAGES FOR THE TIME AND MONEY SPENT IN PURSUIT OF THE CONVERTED PROPERTY IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,000.00.
